requirements.heading: The dependency installation completes without peer dependency conflicts.
The production build completes with zero TypeScript and zero ESLint errors.
All Jest snapshot tests pass after the upgrade.
All Playwright E2E tests pass after the upgrade.
The CI workflow runs on Node 24 and passes lint and test steps.
All five pages render without runtime errors.
Dark mode styles apply correctly on all pages.
scenarioNames: Dark mode renders on all pages

requirements.heading: ESLint executes using the flat config format with zero errors.
The mobile navigation menu opens and closes correctly.
The active navigation link is highlighted in both Header and Footer.
